title: /SetHome for Fabric
description: This project adds a /sethome, /home, /tpa, /tpahere, /rtp! These all work for Fabric for 26.1.2 with older versions coming Soon!
body: This is litteraly just a /sethome with /tpa and /rtp commands, all server side! You can do /serthome to make a home, /home to tp to the home you made, /tpa to request to teleport to another player, /tpahere to teleport a player to the location you are standing, an then /rtp to randomly teleport to a random location in the world.
